impact: npm test exits 1 due to 7 intentionally-failing TDD stubs installed by T-017. isStateSupported (T-020), checkEligibility (T-021), and canActivateSubscription (T-024) all throw 'not implemented'. These are expected to fail until their respective implementation tickets are worked. No production impact.
title: Pre-existing TDD invariant stubs cause test suite to fail (T-020, T-021, T-024)
